title: Impromptu Lines Upon A Very Handsome Woman Keeping The Hotel De Lion Blanc, At Dantzig.
content:
The sign of the house should be chang'd, I'll be sworn,
    Where enchanted we find so much beauty and grace;
    Then quick from the door let the lion be torn,
    And an angel expand her white wings in his place.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, John Carr (Sir) delivers a powerful performance in "Impromptu Lines Upon A Very Handsome Woman Keeping The Hotel De Lion Blanc, At Dantzig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
